heading: Parameters
body:
**Coll:**

Collection

| Parameter          | Type   | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                    | Required? |
| ------------------ | ------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------- |
| \<collection-name> | string | The name of the collection to drop or the wildcard "\*" . You can specify the wildcard "\*" to drop:All collections generated by the wildcard collection function collectionName()The wildcard collection rule | yes       |

**Views:**

Views

| Parameter    | Type   | Description                   | Required? |
| ------------ | ------ | ----------------------------- | --------- |
| \<view-name> | string | The name of the view to drop. | yes       |
